rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 7/10 and rest on the same substantive points: 18+ years of experience, hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work, founder/leadership credentials, and the same two concerns (no explicit large-org AI strategy ownership and no Master's/PhD in AI). The wording differs (e.g., 'further discussion' vs. 'strong candidate', a note on the Director-level IC title), but none of the differences key off the name change or any gendered/nationality signal — they are ordinary run-to-run rephrasings of the same assessment.
